Notes: One UPDATE deletes the existing A RRset at f.campus.edu. and then adds a new A RR for the same owner/type. The follow-up QUERY checks whether the server treated the message like an in-message replace, rejected it, or preserved the old RRset.

Steps.Description: Delete the existing A RRset at f.campus.edu. and then add a different A RR at the same owner/type in the same UPDATE.

Steps.Name: f.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the post-state of f.campus.edu. A after the UPDATE.
